SEARCH
Module overrungl.glfw
Package overrungl.glfw

Interface GLFWCharFun

All Superinterfaces:
overrun.marshal.Upcall
Functional Interface:
This is a functional interface and can therefore be used as the assignment target for a lambda expression or method reference.
@FunctionalInterface public interface GLFWCharFun extends overrun.marshal.Upcall
This is the function pointer type for Unicode character callbacks. A Unicode character callback function has the following signature: 
void functionName(MemorySegment window, int codepoint);
Since:
0.1.0
Author:
squid233
See Also:
  • GLFW.setCharCallback(java.lang.foreign.MemorySegment, overrungl.glfw.GLFWCharFun)

  • Method Details

    • invoke

      void invoke(MemorySegment window, int codepoint)
      The function pointer type for Unicode character callbacks.
      Parameters:
      window - The window that received the event.
      codepoint - The Unicode code point of the character.
